title: Rook
description: You have just learned how to output text to the screen and your teacher has challenged you to create an ASCII art of a chess piece. You have decided to make your favorite piece, the rook.
output: The rook art, exactly as shown below, with no extra blank spaces. In particular, a line must not end with a blank space.
source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2020, Novice, School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2020, Advanced
